story: Years after a shy hallway bump and a math-class friendship, Jace and Allison built the kind of family Jace once dreamed of: four kids, cider nights, and a promise to face problems together. May fourteenths and Valentine’s Days became their touchstones. On their thirty-fifth Valentine’s evening, they take a quiet walk by the river to reminisce. Allison’s sister texted her: "All set—by 8 p.m. the kids and grandparents will have the living room ready for a vow renewal.!" As twilight deepens and the stars appear, they stroll along the water.
implausible_knowledge: Allison’s sister texted her: "All set—by 8 p.m. the kids and grandparents will have the living room ready for a vow renewal.!"
question: What will Jace most likely plan to do?
answer_without_knowledge: Linger by the river with Allison, continuing to reminisce under the stars.
